node.title: Seeking Tips for Uber SDE1 Managerial Round

topic.title: Seeking Tips for Uber SDE1 Managerial Round

post.content: I\u2019m preparing for the managerial round for the SDE1 position at Uber and would love to hear about your experiences. What types of questions were asked? How did the interviewers assess cultural fit and leadership qualities? Any tips on how to approach this round effectively would be greatly appreciated!\n\nThanks in advance for sharing your insights!
can you share your problem solving and lld round experience.\n
for sde 2 questions asked were : discuss when u resolved conflict between 2 team members, feedback u received and how u contributed to company culture.
